title: Livelier Melons
body:
**Ever thought melons in Minecraft looked sad? Wish they were more vibrant and colorful? This is the pack for you!**

Livelier Melons changes the sprite of Melon Slices and Glistering Melon Slices to a much brighter, more saturated, and cuter one! It also makes Melon blocks much greener.

---
### Credits
- Melon Slice and Glistering Melon Slice sprites by me
- Melon Block textures are re-colorized JAPPA melon textures

*Compatible with versions 1.13.0 - 1.20.1 and presumably all future versions*
